Author: kittenhaswares-ui
Name: HOWMANY
Punchline: See how many PvP opponents are focusing you.
Description: A movable PvP overlay showing visible enemy hard/cast targets and recent harmful pressure, with job icons. Built primarily for Crystalline Conflict; configure with /howmany.
Changelog: Fixes Crystalline Conflict detection with native hard/cast targets plus configurable recent harmful-pressure fallback. Adds /howmany debug and live diagnostics.
